heading: Expert accountant for Inspector General
label: 7374 Expert accountant for Inspector General
text: The Secretary of the Army shall appoint an expert accountant to perform duties under the Inspector General.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)402410:52.(7th clause under “Miscellaneous”), .Feb. 24, 1891, ch. 28426 Stat. 773The words “in case of vacancy” are omitted as surplusage.
Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 4024 of this title

Effective Date of 2018 AmendmentAmendment by effective , with provision for the coordination of amendments and special rule for certain redesignations, see , set out as a note preceding .Pub. L. 115–232section 800 of Pub. L. 115–232section 3001 of this titleFeb. 1, 2019
